remarks: Welcome to 110 Woodside Green (110 Summer Street), Unit #3A in Stamford. Rarely available, oversized two-bedroom condominium in the highly sought-after Woodside Green community. Nestled within a charming pre-war complex surrounded by beautifully landscaped, park-like grounds, this pet-friendly residence offers the perfect blend of timeless character, modern updates, and everyday convenience-all with low HOA dues. The spacious interior features gleaming hardwood floors, fresh paint, an updated kitchen with new appliances, a gas range, and an abundance of closet space throughout. Large windows fill the home with natural light, creating a bright, warm, and inviting atmosphere. Residents enjoy a variety of amenities, including shared laundry facilities, bike storage, outdoor grilling areas, and off-street parking for 2 cars and ample guest parking conveniently located just steps from the unit. Ideally situated adjacent to Ridgeway Shopping Center with Starbucks, Stop & Shop, LA Fitness, Staples, restaurants, and other everyday conveniences, this home also offers easy access to downtown Stamford, Stamford Train Station, I-95, and the Merritt Parkway. Whether you're searching for a primary residence or an investment opportunity, this move-in-ready home offers an outstanding combination of space, value, location, and lifestyle.
